SourceProxy.name: ClusteringAndTracking
SourceProxy.label: Clustering and Tracking

Documentation.short_help: Extract and track clusters in a pointcloud
Documentation.long_help: Extract and track clusters in a pointcloud

SourceProxy.Documentation: Clustering and tracking filter extract clusters of points from lidar frames. It can also do a rough tracking for temporal lidar data.

Property.name: Reset
Property.Documentation: Reset clustering and tracking states. GMM model or region growing maps are cleared. Parameters are reset to current state. The number of processed frames returns to 0. The counter of cluster id returns to 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: Cluster extractor
IntVectorProperty.Documentation:
Choose an extractor for clustering:
(0) Do not extract clusters
(1) Euclidean clustering: This method groups points based on their spatial proximity. It is ideal for identifying quickly compact motion areas.
(2) Gaussian mixture model: This method utilizes probabilistic model based on distances between points and works well in complex environments. It offers a rough tracking of clusters.
(3) Region growing: This method build a voxel grid on the motion points and expands regions in the grid. It is particularly useful when motion points are scattered but related. It offers a rough tracking of clusters.

IntVectorProperty.name: Compute cluster orientation
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If enable, the PCA is applied to the points of clusters to compute the orientation of clusters.

IntVectorProperty.name: Enable background map
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Enable/disable background map for the clustering with region growing method.

IntVectorProperty.name: Initialization time
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of frames to wait for building background map.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Cluster radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The search radius to find cluster.

IntVectorProperty.name: Cluster minimum point number
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of neighbors that a point must have within the specified radius. Otherwise, the point will be removed.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Clustering grid resolution
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The size of the voxel grid (in meters) which is used to extract clusters.

IntVectorProperty.name: Set tracking window sizes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Window size (in frames) to perform tracking in GMM. Higher values would result in objets that are tracked for longer (after disapearing)
